summary: Created 4-phase plan for implementing 3 index management scripts (add/remove/search) and wiring --task N mode into /zotero command

artifacts.summary: 4-phase implementation plan: zotero-index-add.sh (2h), zotero-index-remove.sh (45m), zotero-search-index.sh (1.5h), --task N mode wiring (45m); total 5 hours
